reportSummary: Most Tomorrow prediction tabs load and change state as expected, but the homepage “LIVE predictions” click did nothing and navigation was occasionally intercepted by a google_vignette interstitial. Load times of 1.6–3.4s were typical for tabs. Accessibility is in bad shape (many missing alts, poor contrast, weak landmarks). Logs show heavy ad/analytics activity, which appears to interfere with navigation at least once.
